title: Bridge Essay: Increased Reporting of Speech in Degraded Stimuli in Schizophrenia: A Case Contr

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Daimonic voice — voice-hearing as spectrum phenomenon, agency detection, inner speech misattribution.

**Increased Reporting of Speech in Degraded Stimuli in Schizophrenia: A Case Control Study with Sine-Wave-Speech.**. Schizophrenia bulletin.. PMID: 41967871. DOI: 10.1093/schbul/sbaf248. BACKGROUND AND HYPOTHESIS: People who hear voices may have strong prior expectations of speech, so that noisy auditory signals are resolved as speech. Data in non-clinical voice hearers suggest that voice hearing may involve sensitivity to speech in degraded stimuli. This has yet to be examined in people with schizophrenia (SZ).
